items.title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
items.summary: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

items.title: Rusi Orešnikom pogodili vlastite vojnike? Blogeri bijesni: "Skup i beskoristan napad"
items.summary: RUSKI blogeri su bijesni na Putina.

items.title: What are the biggest FIFA World Cup upsets in history?
items.summary: Nothing makes the news like an unfancied or low-ranked team pulling off a shock result at the football World Cup.

items.title: Španjolska policija pronašla marihuanu u hrvatskom kamionu
items.summary: ŠPANJOLSKA policija otkrila je 100 kg marihuane u hrvatskom kamionu i uhitila vozača daleko od njegove rute.

items.title: Paraglider survives mid-air collision with plane over Austria
items.summary: Paraglider survives mid-air collision with plane over Austria

items.title: Yamal in Spain’s World Cup squad, but no room for Real Madrid players
items.summary: Yamal, one of eight Barcelona players named in the 26-man squad, with seven Arsenal players picked by Luis de la Fuente.

items.title: Rusija: Na tankeru u našoj luci pronađene magnetske mine
items.summary: NA TANKERU u ruskoj luci Ust-Luga pronađene su i deaktivirane magnetske mine, navodno NATO porijekla.

items.title: The world urgently needs a US-Iran deal now
items.summary: Without a deal between Washington and Tehran, the fallout from Strait of Hormuz closure could deepen global crises.

items.title: China’s Xi praises ‘unbreakable’ Pakistan ties as Sharif visits Beijing
items.summary: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif says China and Pakistan are 'iron brother' countries.

items.title: Cattle market empties as fear grips Eid preparations in India’s West Bengal
items.summary: Tensions rise in key state, won by BJP this month for first time, as political shift disrupts Eid al-Adha traditions.

items.title: Usred ratne prijetnje u Iranu muslimani krenuli na hadž u Meku
items.summary: STOTINE tisuća muslimana i ove godine krenule su na hadž u Meku u Saudijskoj Arabiji, unatoč stalnoj prijetnji koju predstavlja rat u Iranu.

items.title: Deal with US not imminent, Iran says
items.summary: The US secretary of state earlier said that an agreement could possibly come on Monday.

items.title: Currently no active leak from failing chemical tank, California officials say
items.summary: The tank, which contains a highly volatile and flammable substance, has been at risk of either a major spillage or an explosion.

items.title: Clashes as Venezuelan prisoners protest over alleged mistreatment
items.summary: The prisoners insisted their protest was peaceful but that security forces deployed to quell it opened fire.

items.title: Trump’s war loop: Escalate, retreat, repeat
items.summary: Stuck in a quagmire of a war, Trump chafes at negative coverage while Iran digs its heels in.

items.title: Senegal's leadership row mounts as parliament speaker resigns
items.summary: Some speculate that El Malick Ndiaye stepped down so that ousted-PM Ousmane Sonko can take his place.

items.title: At least 19 people taken to hospital after 'strong smell' reported at Tokyo mall
items.summary: Police say a man sprayed a substance at an ATM in the luxury Ginza 6 shopping centre.

items.title: Papa Lav poziva svijet da uspori s umjetnom inteligencijom
items.summary: PAPA Lav u svojoj je prvoj enciklici pozvao vlade da uspore razvoj sustava umjetne inteligencije, upozoravajući da oni šire dezinformacije, daju prednost sukobima i prijete vođenjem svijeta putem beskonačnog rata. Lav XIV. uputio je niz strastvenih apela svjetskim vođama u opsežnoj enciklici Magnifi

items.title: U DR Kongu zapaljen centar za liječenje ebole, pacijenti nestali
items.summary: USTANOVA za liječenje ebole u istočnoj Demokratskoj Republici Kongo zapaljena je nakon napada lokalnog stanovništva, pri čemu se 13 pacijenata vodi kao nestalo, dok vlasti istražuju incident u regiji pogođenoj novim valom epidemije i rastućim nepovjerenjem prema zdravstvenim vlastima.

items.title: U Banjoj Luci uhićen krijumčar oružja u EU. Našli desetke granata, eksploziv, puške
items.summary: POLICIJA u Bosni i Hercegovini uhitila je u ponedjeljak u Banjoj Luci muškarca zbog sumnje da je bio uključen u ilegalnu trgovinu oružjem, a u stanu koji je koristio pronašli su desetke ručnih granata, eksploziv i oružje.
